title: satureja calamintha subsp. nepeta
intro: Satureja calamintha subsp. nepeta, also known as Nepeta calamintha, is a subspecies of the Calamintha genus, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion, nausea, and flatulence, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Satureja calamintha subsp. nepeta include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory function. It can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or added to food to reap its medicinal benefits, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
